message:
refactor(demo): use ftui-text width functions and expand screen implementations

Replace direct unicode_width usage with ftui-text's display_width and
grapheme_width functions across all demo showcase screens.

Additionally includes expanded screen implementations:
- dashboard.rs: Add Budget tracking struct, coalesce helper, improved
  widget rendering with frame metrics
- visual_effects.rs: Optimize reaction-diffusion with pre-allocated
  buffers (u_next/v_next) to avoid per-frame allocation
- code_explorer.rs: Enhanced code display and navigation
- data_viz.rs: Extended chart and visualization components
- forms_input.rs: Improved form field handling
- macro_recorder.rs: Extended macro recording functionality
- widget_gallery.rs: Additional widget demonstrations
- file_browser.rs, shakespeare.rs, markdown_rich_text.rs: Width
  function updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
